scripts.dev:dummy-data: rm -f /tmp/rentmate_dummy.db && RENTMATE_DB_PATH=/tmp/rentmate_dummy.db poetry run python scripts/seed_dummy_data.py && RENTMATE_DB_PATH=/tmp/rentmate_dummy.db npm run dev --prefix www/rentmate-ui
scripts.lint: poetry run ruff check . && poetry run python scripts/lint_kwargs.py
scripts.test: poetry run pytest && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:install && npm run test:evals
